name: kiro-pack
description: Kiro agent with the kiro-config-pack guard + memory hooks wired via the agent-config hooks block (the mechanism kiro-cli 2.11.0 actually loads; standalone ~/.kiro/hooks/*.json files are not read by this build). Use with `kiro-cli chat --agent kiro-pack` or `kiro-cli agent set-default kiro-pack`.

agentSpawn.command: git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 && { echo "## Git context"; git status -sb; echo; echo "Recent commits:"; git log --oneline -5; } || true

postToolUse.command: P=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.path // empty'); case "$P" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.json|*.css|*.md) [ -x node_modules/.bin/prettier ] && node_modules/.bin/prettier --write "$P" >/dev/null 2>&1;; *.py) ruff format "$P" 2>/dev/null || black -q "$P" 2>/dev/null;; *.tf|*.tfvars) command -v tofu >/dev/null 2>&1 && tofu fmt "$P" >/dev/null 2>&1;; esac; exit 0
